short_description: Port 4 on SW-U04 CRC errors rising - suspect cable damage
description: SW-U04 port 4 (Gi0/4) CRC error counter is climbing at ~200/minute. Link is up and passing traffic but with heavy retransmits. Cable is routed along a PDU run and may be picking up EMI, or a connector is cracked. Replace patch cable and clear counters; escalate if errors return within 1 hour.

cmdb.port_short_description: admin=up oper=up speed=1G duplex=full vlan=10 mode=access stp=forwarding
